title: gastrodia × nippouraiensis
intro: Gastrodia × nippouraiensis is a rare, hybrid orchid species that is native to Japan. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Gastrodia × nippouraiensis include its ability to relieve muscle spasms, reduce anxiety and stress, and improve sleep quality. In herbal preparations, the rhizomes of Gastrodia × nippouraiensis are often dried and then used to make teas, capsules, or tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions.
